articles.description: With Himanta Biswa Sarma criss-crossing the State as campaigner-in-chief, the challenge for local BJP canvassers in Jalukbari is to ensure healthy numbers in order to match or better the CM’s six-figure margin from 2021

articles.description: Any account of Christianity’s arrival in India begins with the opening chapters of the Acts of Thomas, a text within the New Testament

articles.title: Assam Police at Congress leader Pawan Khera's Delhi residence day after FIR by CM Sarma's wife
articles.description: Khera on Sunday alleged in a press conference that Sarma’s wife has passports of the UAE, Egypt, and Antigua and Barbuda and owns property in Dubai.

articles.title: SpiceJet cites ‘technical issue’ after Delhi–Bengaluru flight delay leaves passengers stranded for 6 hours
articles.description: SpiceJet flight SG199 from Delhi to Bangalore was delayed on Monday for over 6 hours. The airline cited a ‘technical issue’ and arranged an alternate aircraft, while passengers expressed frustration over lack of communication and support.

articles.title: Two British nationals jailed for illegal entry into India from Nepal
articles.description: The two hold Nepal visas but were found to be without valid documents for entry into India and were subsequently arrested in November 2025

Since the start of the war, oil prices have risen by over 50%, though price levels in India remain steady. Check petrol & diesel prices today, 7 April.

dailyNews.title: Iranian people request US to keep bombing:  resident Donald Trump’s bizarre claim sparks reactions, ‘Voices in his head’
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump claims that Iranian civilians support US strikes on their infrastructure for freedom, despite concerns over potential violations of international law. Experts warn that targeting civilian infrastructure could backfire, turning public opinion against the US.

dailyNews.description: Political analyst Trita Parsi says no one should be surprised that Iran has rejected the idea of a US ceasefire deal.

dailyNews.description: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman warned that the US-Iran conflict poses risks to the global economy, describing it as a systemic tremor.

dailyNews.title: Michigan holds off UConn to capture first men's basketball national title since 1989
dailyNews.description: Michigan defeated UConn to claim the men's basketball national championship, ending a title drought dating back to 1989 in a gritty NCAA Tournament final.

dailyNews.title: Nutella capitalizes on greatest free advertising moment in history on NASA Moon mission
dailyNews.description: A floating Nutella jar aboard NASA's Artemis II went viral, with internet users calling the zero-gravity moment the greatest free advertisement in history.

dailyNews.title: Coach K invokes Bill Belichick's rough UNC debut when asked about Michael Malone's Tar Heels hire
dailyNews.description: Duke legend Mike Krzyzewski isn't worried about UNC reportedly hiring NBA champion coach Michael Malone, citing Bill Belichick's tough transition to college.

dailyNews.title: CM Punk torches Pat McAfee after he's inserted into major WWE feud, demands WrestleMania ticket prices lowered
dailyNews.description: CM Punk fired back at ESPN broadcaster Pat McAfee on "Monday Night Raw," slamming his involvement in a major WrestleMania 42 feud with Cody Rhodes.

dailyNews.title: Economist editor says European leaders now fear a true NATO 'divorce' after Trump pullout threat
dailyNews.description: Trump is reportedly considering pulling the U.S. out of NATO, and European leaders are coming to terms with what may be a true divorce, says an editor.

dailyNews.title: Influencer Jake Paul says Charlie Kirk would have been 'the next president'
dailyNews.description: Jake Paul says Charlie Kirk would have eventually become president if he were not assassinated, while noting his own political ambitions after receiving Trump's endorsement.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens Iran with attacks on infrastructure unless deal is struck
dailyNews.description: President Trump has set a deadline of Tuesday night for Iran to make a deal, or face escalated attacks. “The entire country can be taken out in one night,” President Trump said, “and that night might be tomorrow night.” NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.

dailyNews.title: The U.S. fighter jet was downed in Iran by a shoulder-fired missile
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said the American F-15 fighter jet was brought down in Iran by a shoulder-fired missile, leading to the dramatic rescue of two airmen.

dailyNews.title: Trump speaks with Artemis II crew after moon flyby: 'Made all of America really proud'
